_comment: Mission-1 batch Phase-3 STAGED reconcile candidates - human approves in the Map client panel. Evidence pulled 2026-07-22/23 (read-only). 'preview' = whole-history BQ totals (AUD, cost = client-billed; all spend falls inside the row's flight).
preparedBy: Mission-1 batch prep session (Claude) - see PHASE3_BATCH_PREP_REPORT.md
platformAudit: One table (perf_the_trade_desk, advertiser 'Qtopia Sydney'), 3 campaign names, one rule claiming all 3 - zero overlap by construction. Meta + Google rows have no source (see unmatchable).
warnings: THE ACID-TEST ROW of this batch: the sheet's TTD clientSpend $1,360.55 is the extreme-mult artifact (media $134.82 x 10.0916) and UNDERSTATES the billed truth by 85% - BQ billed $2,519.86 equals the row's $2,520 budget to the dollar. Approving corrects the sheet upward; verify the preview before ticking.
platformMargin 0.50 is below the 0.60-0.65 standard (carry-forward 6) - eyeball before sync.

pairs.rationale: 3 campaigns (CONV_MEL $399.97 + CONV_NSW $620.01 + CONV_SYD $1,499.88) summing $2,519.86 = the row's $2,520 budget to the dollar; all spend within the 06-07..06-29 flight (stray zero-cost rows through 07-20). spendMult 10.0916 -> 1.

spendMultResets.reason: Windsor TTD cost = client-billed (billed = budget to the dollar)

unmatchableGridRows.reason: No QTopia account exists in raw_windsor.perf_meta (account roster verified: Cityperfume / Ad Assembly x2 / Reset backup / 100% Digital - Clients) and there is no Snowflake Meta table at all. Stays sheet-valued (media $2,457.01).
No QTopia customer in the DTS transfer (customers: City Perfume/Liberty/Paradise/Reset Data/TLM) and raw_snowflake.google_ads_apac is STT-only. Row has no spend recorded anyway. Stays sheet-valued.
